questions: Is the consumer ABORT a bug or documented posture?
Which canary classes are safe to relax inside code spans?
What do the two new host layouts require of dist_compile?

findings.summary: mask_code_blocks + --mask-code-blocks exist since Phase 53 (py:133-148); audit site deliberately strict per docstring :143-144
hidden-html canary `<script ` at py:98 matches CLI placeholders in code spans -- the consumer's false-positive class
instruction classes (redirect/role/pass-coercion/meta-override) are imperative inside code spans too; must stay binding everywhere
hosts.py _HOSTS registry :84-89 with register_host seam :92; docstring already names Cursor/Windsurf
dist_compile TARGETS :22 dispatch :131-143; cursor is claude-shaped, cline family shares one flattened command-file layout
both new targets are weak-tier channels -> receive Phase 187 inject_negative_constraints; claude stays the untransformed mirror
